title: The ability to pay per seat without paying for seats you don't need.
excerpt: I build Monday boards for many of my clients… is there a way you can have the seats changed to the actual number of seats you need vs paying for seats that you don’t need? this is an on going concern for many of my clien…

posts.author: laurenstewart01 (Lauren)
posts.cookedHtml: I build Monday boards for many of my clients… is there a way you can have the seats changed to the actual number of seats you need vs paying for seats that you don’t need? this is an on going concern for many of my clients… both my clients and our company do not want to pay for seats that are not being used.
